entity.summary: China-origin crypto broker and exchange platform founded in 2012 and described on its official domain as headquartered in Beijing.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0307. BitKan's current official site confirms a 2012 founding, while an official-domain company explainer identifies Beijing, China as its headquarters. HEI records China as the historical operating origin rather than inferring a current legal domicile.

events.title: BitKan recorded as centralized exchange
events.description: BitKan is recorded as a China-origin crypto broker and exchange platform based on its official domain, 2012 operating history, and CoinGecko exchange source row.
events.notes: Upgrade with a precise launch, licensing, or major operating-history event if stronger dated sources are added.

evidence.title: What to Do if You are not Receiving Verification Texts on BitKan?
evidence.notes: The official-domain explainer states that BitKan was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Beijing, China. This supports historical operating origin, not a current legal-domicile claim.
